/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -O3 -Wall -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libimgui.so -o libimgui.so CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/home/rodrigo/Libraries/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/home/rodrigo/Libraries/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/home/rodrigo/Libraries/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/home/rodrigo/Libraries/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/home/rodrigo/Libraries/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/home/rodrigo/Libraries/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/home/rodrigo/Libraries/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o   -L/home/rodrigo/Libraries/pcl1.15.0/lib
